title: CORONASTEP: Monitoring of SARS-CoV-2 in Luxembourg wastewater
author: Ogorzaly Leslie
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset presents the results of national-wide wastewater monitoring efforts in Luxembourg through the sampling of 13 different wastewater treatment plants across the country from March 2020 to 2023.
steps_raw: This dataset presents the results of national-wide wastewater monitoring efforts in Luxembourg through the sampling of 13 different wastewater treatment plants across the country from March 2020 to 2023.
